title: ranunculus mediocrifidus
intro: Ranunculus mediocrifidus, also known as lesser clematis or water crowfoot, is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ranunculus mediocrifidus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus mediocrifidus can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
